source_pr.title: plan, tidb: support plan cache for SELECT statement
source_pr.body:
main change:
1. add a simple lru cache, defined in **plan/cache/lru.go**
2. in function `func (s *session) Execute(sql string) ([]ast.RecordSet, error)`, we check the opportunity to use plan cache first
3. currently, we only add select statement into cache

root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a Go data race introduced by plan cache reuse: cached plans/structures (e.g., index ranges inside IndexLookup/plan nodes) were shared across executions and could be mutated while being reused, triggering race-detector failures in the unit test suite. This PR stabilizes it by avoiding unsafe sharing of mutable structures (e.g., cloning index ranges before use) and refactoring cached statement/plan values so reused plans are treated as immutable snapshots.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing mutable plan objects across cached executions: deep-clone mutable fields (e.g., index ranges) before mutation/use and treat cached plans as immutable snapshots.

evidence: files: plan/cache/key.go, plan/cache/lru.go, plan/cache/lru_test.go, session.go, ast/ast.go, config/config.go, config/config.toml.example, executor/adapter.go, executor/compiler.go, executor/prepared.go, expression/builtin_info.go, expression/constant_fold.go, plan/cacheable_checker.go, tidb-server/main.go, plan/cache/sharded_lru.go, plan/cache/simple_lru.go, plan/cache/simple_lru_test.go, plan/cache/value.go, ddl/ddl_db_change_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, tidb.go, executor/builder.go, util/types/range.go, plan/cacheable_checker_test.go
